basic_details.job_title: Greater Chennai Corporation Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Interns and Subject Matter Experts and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Greater Chennai Corporation Interns and Subject Matter Experts Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Greater Chennai Corporation. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the Greater Chennai Corporation Recruitment 2026 for the posts of Interns, Communication, Consultation, Training Subject Matter Expert, and Policy Subject Matter Expert.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Social Science or Urban Planning, Master’s Degree in Communication / Sociology / Social work or equivalent, Master’s Degree in Public Policy / Urban Planning or equivalent
qualification.details: Interns: Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Social Science or Urban Planning. Experience: 0 – 3 years Communication, Consultation, Training Subject Matter Expert: Master’s Degree in Communication / Sociology / Social work or equivalent. Experience: 1 – 3 years Policy Subject Matter Expert: Master’s Degree in Public Policy / Urban Planning or equivalent. Experience: 5 – 10 years

vacancy_details.Post Name: Communication, Consultation, Training Subject Matter Expert

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Greater Chennai Corporation Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Greater Chennai Corporation Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Greater Chennai Corporation recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Greater Chennai Corporation recruitment is 22nd June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the posts of Interns and Subject Matter Experts in the Greater Chennai Corporation recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for these positions?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for these positions by sending their applications via email.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Intern posts?
faq.answer: For the Intern posts, candidates should possess a Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Social Science or Urban Planning.

faq.question: Q5. What is the experience required for the Policy Subject Matter Expert role?
faq.answer: The Policy Subject Matter Expert position requires an experience of 5 to 10 years.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates in this Greater Chennai Corporation recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Interns and Subject Matter Experts are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Which city is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for positions located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of the Greater Chennai Corporation?
faq.answer: The official website of the Greater Chennai Corporation is www.chennaicorporation.gov.in, which is also provided in the 'Important Links' section.
